# Lutakko.info

> Lutakko.info is the official visitor and partner site for **Lutakon Satama** — the harbour district at the heart of Jyväskylä, Finland. The site is operated by **Voon IQ** (voon.fi · info@voon.fi). It covers festivals, restaurants, saunas, the guest marina, and family-friendly activities along the Päijänne lakeshore. Bilingual (Finnish + English).

## Quick facts

- **Place:** Lutakon Satama district, Lutakko, 40100 Jyväskylä, Finland
- **Lake:** Päijänne (the harbour is its northernmost passenger harbour)
- **Marina:** 46 guest berths with shore power, water, fuel and sauna access (2017 Guest Harbour of the Year honourable mention)
- **Operator of this site:** Voon IQ — info@voon.fi · https://voon.fi

## Major events at Lutakon Satama (2026)

- [OlutSatama](https://lutakko.info/venues/olutsatama/): 11–13 June 2026, "Finland's best beer event", 200+ breweries on Lutakonaukio.
- [SuomiPop Festival](https://lutakko.info/venues/suomipop/): 9–11 July 2026, Finnish-pop festival on the Lutakko waterfront.
- [Secto Rally Finland](https://lutakko.info/venues/secto-rally/): 30 July – 2 August 2026, WRC round with the Service Park at Paviljonki.
- [Finlandia Marathon](https://lutakko.info/venues/finlandia-marathon/): Jyväskylä's marathon classic (content coming soon).

## Restaurants, saunas, ships

- [Saunaravintola Sataman Viilu](https://lutakko.info/venues/viilu/): timber sauna restaurant hovering over the lake (satamanviilu.fi).
- [M/S Musta Magia / Limanda](https://lutakko.info/venues/musta-magia/): 200-seat restaurant ship with weekend karaoke and Sunday live music (mustamagia.fi).
- [Konttiravintola Morton](https://lutakko.info/venues/morton/): "the original container restaurant" at Satamakatu 2, open in summer (morton.fi).
- [Ravintolalaiva Gaia](https://lutakko.info/venues/gaia/): historic inland-steamer restaurant ship.
- [Jyväskylän Sataman Kahvila](https://lutakko.info/venues/sataman-kahvila/): café in a 1919 yellow timber building, run by MatkaRhea, daily 10–20 from April (msrhea.fi).
- [Trattoria Aukio](https://lutakko.info/venues/trattoria-aukio/): Italian restaurant on Lutakonaukio (content coming soon).
- [HIISI-panimo](https://lutakko.info/venues/hiisi/): local microbrewery taproom + bottleshop (hiisi.beer).
- [Saunalautat](https://lutakko.info/venues/saunalautta/): Lutakko hosts several sauna-raft operators — a unified booking hub is in pilot.

## Culture & sports

- [Tanssisali Lutakko](https://lutakko.info/venues/tanssisali-lutakko/): legendary rock club operated by Jelmu ry, set in an early-1900s heritage industrial building beside Lutakonaukio (jelmu.net).

## Architecture & promenade

- **Alvar Aalto Museum** is adjacent; a permanent Alvar Aalto-designed boat is on display at the harbour.
- **Jyväskylän Rantaraitti**: 13 km accessible lakeside trail that starts at the harbour.
- **Kuokkalan silta**: bridge arching across the lake — a city-skyline landmark.

## Booking & partnerships

Visitors can sign up at [lutakko.info/dashboard/](https://lutakko.info/dashboard/) to manage activity and sauna reservations. Businesses can become listing / sponsorship partners via the "Become a partner" form on each venue page — enquiries go to **info@voon.fi**.
